title: Ollama image pin ollama/ollama:0.6 yanked from Docker Hub (P0)

executionHistory.summary: BUG-001 filed under spec 043 Scope 01 territory. Symptom: ollama/ollama:0.6 yanked from Docker Hub (HTTP 404 against tags API); blocks ./smackerel.sh test integration because environments.test.ollama_enabled=true (spec 043 Scope 03) auto-starts ollama. Verified: latest stable per github.com/ollama/ollama/releases/latest is v0.23.2; HTTP 200 against tags API. Discovered while running spec 044 Scope 1 integration tests.

Fix landed: (1) config/smackerel.yaml infrastructure.ollama.image and infrastructure.ollama.test.image both re-pinned 0.6 -> 0.23.2 with audit-trail comment; (2) deploy/contract.yaml externalImages.ollama.image bumped 0.6 -> 0.23.2; (3) deploy/compose.deploy.yml services.ollama.image bumped 0.6 -> 0.23.2; (4) tests/integration/ollama_config_contract_test.go AdversarialMissingTestImage strip target updated 0.6 -> 0.23.2 (so the existing strip-and-rerun adversarial continues to find its target line in the live YAML); (5) config/generated/{dev,test,self-hosted}.env regenerated via for env in dev test self-hosted; do ./smackerel.sh --env $env config generate; done -- all three carry OLLAMA_IMAGE=ollama/ollama:0.23.2; (6) NEW tests/integration/ollama_image_availability_test.go (build tag integration) -- TestOllamaImagePinIsPublished_LiveTag reads OLLAMA_IMAGE from config/generated/test.env and HEADs https://hub.docker.com/v2/repositories/ollama/ollama/tags/<tag>, asserts HTTP 200; TestOllamaImagePinIsPublished_AdversarialYankedTag asserts HTTP 404 for the synthetic input ollama/ollama:0.6 (proves the live test is non-tautological). Zero t.Skip-family calls; fail-loud paths use t.Fatalf.

Targeted regression tests PASS live: TestOllamaImagePinIsPublished_LiveTag PASS 0.43s (HTTP 200 against ollama/ollama:0.23.2); TestOllamaImagePinIsPublished_AdversarialYankedTag PASS 0.11s (HTTP 404 against ollama/ollama:0.6). Pre-existing TestOllamaConfigGenerateAndRuntimeValidationStayInSync + 3 adversarial sub-cases PASS 1.31s after the strip-target update. internal/deploy/compose_ollama_contract_test.go (1 LiveFile + 3 adversarial guards) PASS. internal/config/sst_grep_guard_test.go (1 main + 2 adversarial guards) + 2 validate gates PASS. Zero new SST violations from the bump.

Full repo gates PASS: ./smackerel.sh check EXIT=0 (Config in sync with SST + env_file drift guard OK + scenario-lint registered=5/0); ./smackerel.sh test unit --go EXIT=0 (all Go packages PASS, 0 fails); ./smackerel.sh test unit --python EXIT=0 (417 pytest tests PASS in 22.41s). All three generated env files contain OLLAMA_IMAGE=ollama/ollama:0.23.2.

Self-audit PASS: artifact-lint specs/043-ollama-test-infrastructure/bugs/BUG-001-ollama-image-pin-stale EXIT=0 (no warnings, no failures). All required artifacts present (spec/design/scopes/uservalidation/state/report/scenario-manifest). All 8 DoD checkboxes [x] with inline raw evidence (Gate G025). All 3 uservalidation checklist items [x]. state.json v3 schema valid. Top-level status matches certification.status. No forbidden sidecar artifacts. Workflow ceiling 'done' permitted for bugfix-fastlane. Required specialist phases (implement, test, validate, audit) all in execution.completedPhaseClaims and certification.certifiedCompletedPhases.
